_comment: Every image the deck references. `tools/make_placeholders.py` reads this file and writes a labeled SVG placeholder for each entry to assets/<name>.svg. To use a real image, drop it in this folder and point the slide at it (or just overwrite the .svg). kind = shot | photo | phone | book.
